title: What are the core interfaces provided by Spring Data JPA?

answers.junior: Spring Data JPA provides interfaces like Repository and JpaRepository to help you perform database operations easily.
answers.middle: The main interfaces are Repository, CrudRepository, PagingAndSortingRepository, and JpaRepository. They offer CRUD, pagination, and sorting methods. JpaRepository adds JPA-specific features.
answers.senior: Spring Data JPA’s core interfaces include Repository (marker), CrudRepository (CRUD), PagingAndSortingRepository (pagination/sorting), JpaRepository (JPA-specific), and JpaSpecificationExecutor (dynamic queries). These interfaces are auto-implemented by Spring, enabling seamless integration with Hibernate.
answers.tricky: Overusing custom queries when built-in methods suffice can lead to maintenance issues. JpaSpecificationExecutor enables complex filtering, but improper use may impact performance. Transaction boundaries and lazy loading must be considered to avoid unexpected behavior.
